checks_skipped.form-errors-associated: The only form is the global site search; a blank submit navigates home and there are no validation or error states to identify or associate.
checks_skipped.autocomplete-tokens: The only form field is a free-text site search (autoComplete=off); there are no personal-data inputs (name, email, address) that carry autocomplete tokens.
checks_skipped.captions: Site has no video or audio content.
checks_skipped.lighthouse-a11y-100: Lighthouse CI is not installed and the `next lint` command was removed in Next 16; axe-core across WCAG 2.0-2.2 A/AA (0 violations) served as the automated floor. Lighthouse is a floor, not proof; adding lighthouserc is recommended.
